description_long: This is a life-sized stone sculpture of a seated man dressed in 18th-century attire, including a ruffled shirt, long coat, breeches, and boots. The figure is depicted with detailed facial features and curly hair, gazing slightly upward and to the side, with one hand resting on his knee and the other holding an object close to his chest. The drapery of the coat and clothing is rendered with deep folds, giving a sense of weight and realism to the fabric. The sculpture sits on a rectangular plinth, which is inscribed with numbers and letters on the back. The overall surface is matte and weathered, suggesting it is made of stone or marble. The posture and attire suggest the subject is a notable historical or cultural figure.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a seated man in 18th-century clothing, with realistic drapery and expressive facial features. The figure sits on a rectangular plinth, holding an object in one hand.
description_view_0: Side view showing the figure's profile, detailed folds of the coat, and the hand resting on the knee.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the draped coat and the inscription on the plinth's back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the other profile, with the hand holding an object close to the chest.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the full face, both hands, and the detailed attire of the seated figure.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate setting.
